name: House Wiring Cable 1.5 RM (100m Roll)
description: High quality copper 1.5 RM house wiring cable. 100 meter roll. Fire retardant PVC insulation. Suitable for all standard household wiring installations.

name: House Wiring Cable 2.5 RM (100m Roll)
description: 2.5 RM copper wiring cable for heavy duty household circuits. 100 meter roll with colour coding.

name: CCTV Cable (100m Roll)
description: High quality coaxial cable for CCTV camera installations. 100 meter roll.

name: Modular Switch (10A Single)
description: 10A single pole modular switch. White finish. Compatible with all standard modular switch boards.

name: 3 Pin Socket 13A (Universal)
description: Universal 13A 3 pin socket outlet. Suitable for all standard plug tops. White finish.

name: MCB Circuit Breaker 32A (Single Pole)
description: 32A single pole MCB circuit breaker. C curve. DIN rail mountable. Provides overload and short circuit protection.

name: RCCB 40A 30mA (Double Pole)
description: 40A double pole RCCB with 30mA sensitivity. Provides earth leakage protection. Essential for bathroom and outdoor circuits.

name: LED Bulb 9W (Cool White)
description: Energy saving 9W LED bulb. Cool white 6500K. E27 base. Replaces 75W incandescent bulb. 800 lumen output. 25,000 hours lifespan.

name: LED Tube Light 18W (2 Feet)
description: 18W 2 feet LED tube light. Daylight white. Direct fit replacement for fluorescent tubes. 1800 lumen. T8 base.

name: LED Panel Light 12W (Square)
description: 12W square LED panel light for false ceiling. Slim design. 1000 lumen. Cut out 150x150mm. Warm white 3000K.

name: Flood Light 50W (Outdoor)
description: 50W outdoor LED flood light. IP65 waterproof. Daylight white 6500K. Suitable for shop fronts, signboards and outdoor areas.

name: Ceiling Fan 56" (5 Blade)
description: 56 inch 5 blade ceiling fan. 3 speed settings with pull chain. High airflow design. 70W motor. Available in white and brown.

name: Stand Fan 16" (3 Speed)
description: 16 inch stand fan. 3 speed settings. Adjustable height from 100-120cm. Oscillation function. 50W motor.

name: Rechargeable Fan (12" with LED Light)
description: 12 inch rechargeable fan with built-in LED light. 3 speed. 6-8 hours backup on full charge. USB charging port.

name: Screwdriver Set (8 Pcs)
description: 8 piece screwdriver set. Includes Phillips and flathead in multiple sizes. CRV steel blades. Soft grip handles.

name: Digital Multimeter
description: Digital multimeter with auto range. Measures AC/DC voltage, current, resistance, continuity and diode. LCD display with backlight.

name: CCTV Camera 2MP (1080p Dome)
description: 2MP 1080p Full HD dome CCTV camera. 3.6mm lens. 20m IR night vision. IP66 weatherproof. Works with all major DVR brands.

name: 4 Channel DVR (1080p)
description: 4 channel H.265+ 1080p DVR. Supports up to 4TB HDD (not included). Mobile viewing via app. HDMI and VGA output.

name: Solar Panel 50W (Monocrystalline)
description: 50W monocrystalline solar panel. 18V open circuit voltage. Anodised aluminium frame. 25 year power output warranty.

name: IPS Battery 200AH (Tubular)
description: 200AH tubular IPS battery. Deep cycle design. Up to 1200 charge cycles. Suitable for home IPS/UPS systems. 2 year warranty.
